key_trials.full_name: Cisplatin plus doxorubicin plus cyclophosphamide in metastatic or recurrent thymoma
key_trials.population: Advanced or recurrent thymoma (29 patients) and thymic carcinoma (1 patient)
key_trials.key_result: 50% overall response rate (3 complete responses, 12 partial responses)
key_trials.practice_change: Established CAP as preferred first-line chemotherapy regimen for thymoma [1, THYM-C 1 of 3]

key_trials.key_result: CAP was associated with higher objective response rate than other regimens (44% vs 17%) as exclusive systemic therapy in patients with advanced thymoma or thymic carcinoma
key_trials.practice_change: Supported CAP as preferred first-line regimen [158]

key_trials.full_name: Multicenter phase II study of carboplatin and paclitaxel for advanced thymic carcinoma
key_trials.key_result: 36% overall response rate (1 complete response, 13 partial responses); median PFS 7.5 months; 2-year OS 71%
key_trials.secondary_outcomes: Median progression-free survival 7.5 months; 2-year overall survival 71%
key_trials.practice_change: Established carboplatin/paclitaxel as preferred first-line regimen for thymic carcinoma [3, THYM-C 1 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Phase II study of carboplatin and paclitaxel in advanced thymoma and thymic carcinoma
key_trials.key_result: Demonstrated activity of carboplatin/paclitaxel in thymic malignancies
key_trials.practice_change: Supported use of carboplatin/paclitaxel for thymoma and thymic carcinoma [2]

key_trials.full_name: RELEVENT phase II trial of ramucirumab plus carboplatin and paclitaxel in untreated metastatic thymic carcinoma
key_trials.population: Treatment-naïve advanced or metastatic thymic carcinoma
key_trials.key_result: ORR 80% by investigator assessment and 57.6% by central review; median OS 43.8 months at median follow-up 31.6 months
key_trials.practice_change: Added carboplatin/paclitaxel + ramucirumab as preferred first-line option for thymic carcinoma [8, THYM-C 1 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Randomized phase 2 trial of carboplatin-paclitaxel with and without ramucirumab in thymic carcinoma
key_trials.population: Unresectable, locally advanced, metastatic, or recurrent thymic carcinoma
key_trials.key_result: Carboplatin/paclitaxel + ramucirumab had higher response rate than carboplatin/paclitaxel (88% vs 40%)
key_trials.practice_change: Supported addition of ramucirumab to carboplatin/paclitaxel [198]

key_trials.full_name: Activity and safety of atezolizumab plus carboplatin and paclitaxel in advanced or recurrent thymic carcinoma
key_trials.practice_change: Added carboplatin/paclitaxel + atezolizumab as other recommended first-line option for thymic carcinoma [9, THYM-C 1 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Phase II study of everolimus in thymoma and thymic carcinoma previously treated with cisplatin-based chemotherapy
key_trials.key_result: Demonstrated activity of everolimus as subsequent therapy in both thymoma and thymic carcinoma
key_trials.practice_change: Established everolimus as preferred subsequent therapy for both thymoma and thymic carcinoma [10, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Phase II study of capecitabine and gemcitabine in metastatic pretreated thymic epithelial tumors
key_trials.key_result: Demonstrated activity of capecitabine/gemcitabine combination; final analysis confirmed results
key_trials.practice_change: Established gemcitabine/capecitabine as preferred subsequent therapy for thymoma and thymic carcinoma [11,12, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: ECOG Phase II trial of octreotide ± prednisone in thymoma and thymic carcinoma
key_trials.practice_change: Established octreotide ± prednisone as preferred subsequent therapy for thymoma when octreotide/dotatate PET-CT positive [13, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Phase II study of pemetrexed in recurrent thymoma and thymic carcinoma
key_trials.key_result: Demonstrated activity of pemetrexed as subsequent therapy
key_trials.practice_change: Established pemetrexed as preferred subsequent therapy for thymoma [15, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Lenvatinib in advanced or metastatic thymic carcinoma
key_trials.key_result: ORR 38%; median OS 28.3 months; 36-month OS rate 35.7%
key_trials.practice_change: Established lenvatinib as preferred subsequent therapy for thymic carcinoma [20, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Pembrolizumab in patients with thymic carcinoma (phase 2 study)
key_trials.secondary_outcomes: Durable responses; high rate of immune-related adverse events (15% severe)
key_trials.practice_change: Established pembrolizumab as preferred subsequent therapy for thymic carcinoma with monitoring for immune-related adverse events [21, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Phase 2 trial of sunitinib in type B3 thymoma or thymic carcinoma
key_trials.population: Advanced or recurrent type B3 thymoma and thymic carcinoma (assessable patients)
key_trials.key_result: ORR 21.4% among 28 assessable patients with thymic carcinoma; median OS 27.8 months
key_trials.practice_change: Supported sunitinib as preferred subsequent therapy for thymic carcinoma [23, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Sunitinib in chemotherapy-refractory thymoma and thymic carcinoma (phase 2)
key_trials.key_result: Partial response in 6/23 patients (26%) with thymic carcinoma
key_trials.secondary_outcomes: Activity regardless of c-Kit mutation status
key_trials.practice_change: Established sunitinib for chemotherapy-refractory thymic carcinoma regardless of c-Kit status [22, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Avelumab plus axitinib in unresectable or metastatic type B3 thymomas and thymic carcinomas
key_trials.population: Advanced thymic carcinoma or type B3 thymoma progressing after ≥1 line of platinum-containing chemotherapy (27 had thymic carcinoma)
key_trials.key_result: ORR 34% overall; lower in prior anti-angiogenic users (15% vs 47% without prior anti-angiogenic); final median OS 23.4 months; 24-month OS rate 48.5% [208]
key_trials.practice_change: Added axitinib + avelumab as other recommended subsequent therapy for thymic carcinoma [24, THYM-C 2 of 3]

key_trials.full_name: Intensity modulated radiation therapy plus etoposide/cisplatin for limited advanced unresectable thymic epithelial tumors
key_trials.journal: Int J Radiat Oncol Biol Phys
key_trials.population: Limited advanced unresectable thymic epithelial tumors
key_trials.practice_change: Supported concurrent chemoradiation as effective treatment for unresectable thymic epithelial tumors [98]

key_trials.full_name: Phase II study of multidisciplinary approach with induction chemotherapy, surgery, RT, and consolidation chemotherapy for unresectable malignant thymomas
key_trials.intervention: Induction chemotherapy → surgery → RT → consolidation chemotherapy
key_trials.key_result: Demonstrated feasibility and efficacy of multimodal approach
key_trials.practice_change: Supported multimodal approach for unresectable thymoma [4]
